default.notes: Cascade-first conservative defaults. Activated by /v1/* (no profile prefix) or /p/default/v1/*.

pi.notes: pi agent — main model passes through, tool calls forced to fast tool-capable model, web search has its own model.

opencode.notes: opencode CLI — minimax-m2.7 as main, fast cascade.

hermes.notes: hermes — qwen3-next as main for aux roles.

claude.notes: Claude Code passthrough — Anthropic Pro OAuth handles main, only proxy logging matters.

codex.notes: codex CLI — inherits default entirely. Customize as needed.
